summary: Iteration 42: Bug Fix Testing - Both bugs verified FIXED. 1) Chat API now responds correctly (8/8 backend tests passed). 2) Mobile/tablet floating buttons (WhatsApp + ChatTrigger) hide when chat opens and reappear when closed.
critical_code_review_comments: get_system_prompt() and generate_response_fallback() functions correctly added to public_routes.py (lines 35-87)
body.chat-open class toggle correctly implemented in App.js useEffect (lines 465-472)
CSS media query @media(max-width:768px) correctly hides .whatsapp-btn and .chat-trigger when body.chat-open (lines 916-920)
Multi-turn conversation context maintained via session_id in MongoDB chat_sessions collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported bugs are now fixed. Chat API responds with LLM-generated messages (DeepSeek/Emergent fallback). Mobile button hiding works at viewports ≤768px. Login page 2-column layout regression test passed.

BUG_FIX_1_Chat_Responding.root_cause: Missing get_system_prompt() and generate_response_fallback() functions caused NameError
BUG_FIX_1_Chat_Responding.fix_applied: Functions added at lines 35-87 in public_routes.py

tests_passed: body.chat-open class added when chat opens
body.chat-open class removed when chat closes
WhatsApp button hidden at 375px when chat open
Chat trigger hidden at 375px when chat open
WhatsApp button hidden at 768px when chat open
Chat trigger hidden at 768px when chat open
BUG_FIX_2_Mobile_Buttons_Hide.root_cause: No mechanism to hide floating buttons when chat modal was open on mobile
BUG_FIX_2_Mobile_Buttons_Hide.fix_applied: 1) Added body.chat-open class toggle in App.js useEffect. 2) Added CSS @media(max-width:768px) rule to hide .whatsapp-btn and .chat-trigger when body.chat-open

regression_tests.landing_page_desktop_1920px: PASSED - Hero section, navigation, all sections load correctly
regression_tests.login_page_2_column_layout: PASSED - Left visual column + right form column present
